settings.title: Settings
settings.diagnosticsUrlInvalid: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.
settings.pollInvalid: Enter a number from 1 to 3600 seconds.
settings.connectivityEndpoints: Latency check endpoints (one URL per line)
settings.ipEndpoints: External IP endpoints (one URL per line)
settings.pathHelp: The app looks for guiConfigs and guiLogs inside this folder.
settings.pathNotDetected: Could not detect v2rayN path automatically.
settings.pathInvalid: Path is invalid: expected v2rayN.exe, guiConfigs, guiLogs.
settings.happPathEmpty: Enter a Happ executable or installation folder path.
settings.happPathInvalid: The path does not contain a recognized Happ executable.
settings.unsavedMessage: Some settings are saved only when you press Save. Close anyway and discard those changes?
happSetup.title: Happ adapter setup
happSetup.subtitle: Path, experimental control and UI diagnostics
happSetup.pathHelp: Leave empty for automatic detection from a running process or common Windows installation folders.
happSetup.pathNotDetected: Happ executable could not be detected. Start Happ once or enter the path manually.
happSetup.experimentalWarning: This mode reads the visible Happ window and clicks only a high-confidence Connect or Disconnect control. It never edits Happ databases or subscription files. UI changes in a future Happ version may disable control until the adapter is updated.
happSetup.enableUiAutomation: I understand and enable experimental Windows UI Automation
debug.title: Debug tools
errors.copyIpMissing: External IP is not available yet
errors.uipiMismatch: Permission mismatch: v2rayN is running as Administrator, but widget is not. Run both apps with the same rights or restart widget as Administrator.
dashboard.pathConfigMissing: v2rayN path is not configured. Open Settings and select your v2rayN folder.
happSetup.loadFailed: Could not load Happ adapter settings.
happSetup.probeRequired: Open Happ and run a successful probe before enabling experimental control.
happSetup.probeNoAction: The probe did not find one unique high-confidence Connect or Disconnect control.
happSetup.probeBeforeEnable: Run a successful Happ probe to unlock this option.
errors.pathOperationFailed: Could not detect or validate the application path.
errors.relaunchFailed: Could not restart the widget as Administrator.
errors.windowOpenFailed: Could not open the requested window.
clientNotes.happEnabled: Experimental Happ connection control is enabled. It remains version- and session-sensitive and fails closed when the target is ambiguous.
clientNotes.happDisabled: Happ status detection is available, but connection control is disabled until it is explicitly configured and successfully probed.
debug.noProbeResult: No probe result is available yet.
